hooks.command: bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}"; case "$f" in *.py) (cd "$(dirname "$f")" && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/backend" && uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null) || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx) (cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/frontend" && npx --yes prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null) || true ;; esac'
